GET CLIENT AUTHORIZATION KEY
aka base64-encoded-clientid-clientsecret

curl 'https://apps.allrecipes.com/v1/oauth2/client-authorization-header?client_id=Allrecipes_Jibo&client_secret=2E4F44833803E86C5FB86CBC8C2723DB6A12F1416D14FEFD22001DA8E5096452'

QWxscmVjaXBlc19KaWJvOjJFNEY0NDgzMzgwM0U4NkM1RkI4NkNCQzhDMjcyM0RCNkExMkYxNDE2RDE0RkVGRDIyMDAxREE4RTUwOTY0NTI=


GET OAUTH2 ACCESS TOKEN

curl --data grant_type=client_credentials \
  -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
  -H "Authorization: Basic QWxscmVjaXBlc19KaWJvOjJFNEY0NDgzMzgwM0U4NkM1RkI4NkNCQzhDMjcyM0RCNkExMkYxNDE2RDE0RkVGRDIyMDAxREE4RTUwOTY0NTI=" \
  https://apps.allrecipes.com/v1/oauth2/access-token

  {"access_token":"/d3GiewHCg/v3dC/w00YBIFJKPn+C7UYPLH30SVDnKHOYSsOJVDDJp1bLSkB/mRzFP3ovGU6web331VFFOesR2qh6I6HowjzLz7OBFSl2i1g3FdsnfbQCvt0n0HLHqT7oFIirQ20d+7EAbv4CXtPuyH/YrPQjcLQ3YddwOBNr992PbsXEMA4SXyKSEprECCYAZfdmuZaC4WNMWno18dLNw==","expires_in":579600,"token_type":"Bearer"}


GET RECIPE 23600

  curl \
    -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer /d3GiewHCg/v3dC/w00YBIFJKPn+C7UYPLH30SVDnKHOYSsOJVDDJp1bLSkB/mRzFP3ovGU6web331VFFOesR2qh6I6HowjzLz7OBFSl2i1g3FdsnfbQCvt0n0HLHqT7oFIirQ20d+7EAbv4CXtPuyH/YrPQjcLQ3YddwOBNr992PbsXEMA4SXyKSEprECCYAZfdmuZaC4WNMWno18dLNw==" \
    https://apps.allrecipes.com/v1/recipes/23600

(see recipe_23600.json)


GET RECIPE 89257

curl \
  -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer /d3GiewHCg/v3dC/w00YBIFJKPn+C7UYPLH30SVDnKHOYSsOJVDDJp1bLSkB/mRzFP3ovGU6web331VFFOesR2qh6I6HowjzLz7OBFSl2i1g3FdsnfbQCvt0n0HLHqT7oFIirQ20d+7EAbv4CXtPuyH/YrPQjcLQ3YddwOBNr992PbsXEMA4SXyKSEprECCYAZfdmuZaC4WNMWno18dLNw==" \
  https://apps.allrecipes.com/v1/recipes/89257

(see recipe_89257.json)
